zh.lifeSummary: 當William Aylesbury於1242年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利時，他的父親William de Aylesbury24歲，母親Mrs William Aylesbury23歲。他於1264年與Mrs William Aylesbury在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1274年在英國享年32歲。

nameMeanings.name: Aylesbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aylesbury (Bucks) or possibly Aylesbeare (Devon).

variants.name: Elsbury
meanings: English: habitational name from Aylesbury (Buckinghamshire), from an Old English personal name Ægel (genitive Ægeles, Ægles) + burg ‘fortified place’ (dative byrig).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Aylesbury was born in 1242, in Aylesbury, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, William de Aylesbury, was 24 and his mother, Mrs William Aylesbury, was 23. He married Mrs William Aylesbury in 1264, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1274, in England, at the age of 32.

ko.lifeSummary: William Aylesbury(이)가 1242년 영국 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Aylesbury(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs William Aylesbury(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1264년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 Mrs William Aylesbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1274년 영국에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.
